21 October 2023

Mr. John Tan

123 Orchard Road, #12-34  
Singapore 234567  

Dear Mr. Tan,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Analyst at Quantum Solutions Pte Ltd (UEN: T12PQ3456A). Your start date will be 1st December 2023, and you will be reporting directly to Dr. Emily Koh, Head of Analytics.

Your starting salary will be SGD 85,000 per annum, subject to statutory deductions, and you will be entitled to the company’s standard benefits package. Please confirm your acceptance of this offer by signing and returning a copy of this letter by 30th October 2023.

Should you have any questions, feel free to contact us at +65 6123 4567 or hr@quantumsolutions.sg.

We look forward to welcoming you to our team.

Yours sincerely,

Ms. Clara Lim  
Human Resources Manager  
Quantum Solutions Pte Ltd
